Juancheng (Settlement) is in Nanyang — chapter 10 means Juancheng County [1296] in Yan Province (Cao Cao's base)
cn=張緝 — Wei politician, died 254. Not chapter 10's Zhang Ji.
cn=張既 — Cao Cao's official, died 223. Not chapter 10's Zhang Ji.
cn=張機 — Zhang Zhongjing the physician. Not a Dong Zhuo lieutenant.
cn=張吉 — Han dynasty politician. Not chapter 10's Zhang Ji.
cn=張邈 different person, Gaoling/Fengyi, Cao Wei era.
cn=張邈 different person, Jin dynasty.
cn=王訪 — different person, Han dynasty.
cn=陳恭 — different person, Han dynasty general from Jiangxia.
cn=程郁 — different person, Liu Zhang faction from Sichuan.
cn=賈詡/賈栩/賈嗣 — different person (aliases Jia Si), Cao Wei general.
Liu Dai the Yanzhou governor died 192 (before this scene). Chapter 10's "Liu Dai then submitted" is the Cao Cao general [1326].
cn=荀俁 — different person, Cao Wei politician (probably Xun Yu's relative).
cn=荀禹 — different person, Cao Wei general.
cn=馬玉 — different person, Shu Han era general.
cn=爰邵 — different person, Cao Wei general.
cn=張梁 — Yellow Turban rebel, died 184. Wrong person; metaphor is 張良 the Han strategist.
cn=張梁 — Eastern Wu general. Wrong person; metaphor is 張良 the Han strategist (missing from DB).
